code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut result = ""
mut first = true
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut value = 0

while i <= n
  mut is_end = false
  mut b = 0
  if i == n
    is_end = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 0
    end
  end

  let is_ws = is_end or b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10

  if is_ws
    if in_num
      let doubled = sign * value * 2
      if first
        result = "#{doubled}"
        first = false
      else
        result = "#{result} #{doubled}"
      end
      in_num = false
      sign = 1
      value = 0
    end
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else if b == 43 and not in_num
    sign = 1
    in_num = true
  else
    value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
